name: HNL-Hi-Tech-FSR
description: HNL Hi-Tech (Pvt) Ltd Field Service Report (FSR) bot — a WhatsApp-connected dashboard where engineers submit a site visit form that gets posted straight to a WhatsApp group.

SESSION_ID.description: Optional fixed session id. Leave blank to pair a fresh session by scanning the QR code from the web dashboard.

MONGODB_URI.description: MongoDB connection string used to store the session, dashboard login and FSR group settings (e.g. from MongoDB Atlas).

COMPANY_NAME.description: Optional. Company name shown at the top of every FSR report. Defaults to "HNL Hi-Tech (Pvt) Ltd".

FSR_GROUP_JID.description: Optional fallback WhatsApp group JID that FSR reports are sent to (the dashboard's Account tab setting takes priority once saved).

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret used to sign dashboard login sessions. Set a long random value.
